papers.title: SpeechLLM-as-Judges: Towards General and Interpretable Speech Quality Evaluation
papers.abstract: Generative speech technologies are progressing rapidly, but evaluating the perceptual quality of synthetic speech remains a core challenge. Existing methods typically rely on scalar scores or binary decisions, which lack interpretability and generalization across tasks and languages. We present SpeechLLM-as-Judges, a new paradigm for enabling large language models (LLMs) to conduct structured and explanation-based speech quality evaluation. To support this direction, we introduce SpeechEval, a large-scale dataset containing 32,207 multilingual speech clips and 128,754 annotations spanning four tasks: quality assessment, pairwise comparison, improvement suggestion, and deepfake detection. Based on this resource, we develop SQ-LLM, a speech-quality-aware LLM trained with chain-of-thought reasoning and reward optimization to improve capability. Experimental results show that SQ-LLM delivers strong performance across tasks and languages, revealing the potential of this paradigm for advancing speech quality evaluation. The relevant code, models, and data are publicly available at https://github.com/NKU-HLT/SpeechLLM-as-Judges.

papers.title: Temporal Contrastive Decoding: A Training-Free Method for Large Audio-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large audio-language models (LALMs) generalize across speech, sound, and music, but unified decoders can exhibit a temporal smoothing bias: transient acoustic cues may be underutilized in favor of temporally smooth context that is better supported by language priors, leading to less specific audio-grounded outputs. We propose Temporal Contrastive Decoding (TCD), a training-free decoding method for unified LALMs that mitigates this effect at inference time. TCD constructs a temporally blurred slow-path view by smoothing the input waveform and re-encoding it, then contrasts next-token logits from the original and slow-path views. The contrastive signal is applied as a token-level logit update restricted to a small candidate set. A self-normalized stability score sets the blur window and update scale, and a step-wise gate based on uncertainty and audio reliance activates the update only when needed. Experiments on MMAU and AIR-Bench show consistent improvements on strong unified LALMs. We further conduct ablations and an architectural applicability study to analyze the contributions of key components and how TCD behaves across large audio-language model designs.

papers.title: PRIM：Cooperative Dynamic Token Compression for Efficient Large Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: Large multimodal models (LMMs) have shown strong capabilities in audio-visual understanding by jointly reasoning over visual, auditory, and linguistic inputs. However, processing long-form audio-visual content often requires a large number of tokens, leading to substantial computational and memory overhead during inference. Existing efficiency-oriented methods typically apply uniform compression or pruning strategies, which overlook modality-specific characteristics and instruction-dependent reasoning behaviors in multimodal models. In this work, we present PRIM, an inference framework for efficient multimodal reasoning that systematically compresses audio-visual representations based on attention dynamics and instruction relevance. Motivated by an attention-based analysis revealing modality imbalance and layer-wise redundancy in LMMs, PRIM introduces a cooperative compression pipeline that spans both multimodal encoders and the language model. Specifically, PRIM performs early text-conditioned audio-visual fusion to externalize cross-modal interactions, applies attention-guided and frequency-aware strategies to remove redundant audio and video tokens, and further adapts token retention inside the language model according to task demands. Extensive experiments on multiple audio-visual benchmark datasets demonstrate that PRIM consistently achieves stable and superior efficiency--accuracy trade-offs across diverse tasks and datasets. These results demonstrate that PRIM, a multimodal cooperative compression approach, provides an effective pathway toward scalable and efficient audio-visual reasoning.

papers.title: Data-efficient Targeted Token-level Preference Optimization for LLM-based Text-to-Speech
papers.abstract: Aligning text-to-speech (TTS) system outputs with human feedback through preference optimization has been shown to effectively improve the robustness and naturalness of LLM-based TTS models. Current approaches primarily require paired desirable and undesirable samples at the utterance level. However, such pairs are often limited in TTS output data, and utterance-level formulation prevents fine-grained token-level optimization needed for accurate pronunciation alignment. In this study, we propose TKTO that eliminates the need for paired data, enabling a more data-efficient training paradigm, and directly targets token-level units, automatically providing fine-grained alignment signals without token-level annotations. TKTO improves the challenging Japanese TTS accuracy by 39% and reduces CER by 54%, leveraging 6× more training data and assigning 12.8× stronger reward to targeted tokens.

papers.title: PRiSM: Benchmarking Phone Realization in Speech Models
papers.abstract: Phone recognition (PR) serves as the atomic interface for language-agnostic modeling for cross-lingual speech processing and phonetic analysis. Despite prolonged efforts in developing PR systems, current evaluations only measure surface-level transcription accuracy. We introduce PRiSM, the first open-source benchmark designed to expose blind spots in phonetic perception through intrinsic and extrinsic evaluation of PR systems. PRiSM standardizes transcription-based evaluation and assesses downstream utility in clinical, educational, and multilingual settings with transcription and representation probes. We find that diverse language exposure during training is key to PR performance, encoder-CTC models are the most stable, and specialized PR systems still outperform LALMs. PRiSM releases code, recipes, and datasets to move the field toward multilingual speech models with robust phonetic ability.

papers.title: WhisperDiari: A Whisper-Based Speaker Diarization Framework in Token Space Leveraging Semantic and Speaker Information for Better Text Adaptability
papers.abstract: Speaker diarization is a fundamental task in speech processing aims to determine 'who speaks when'. When combined with ASR, it enables speaker-labeled transcription with broad practical value. Most existing methods rely on frame-level classification, but the high cost of annotating mixed-speaker audio limits the availability of large-scale, accurately labeled datasets. As a result, even state-of-the-art models struggle with imprecise speaker boundary detection and semantic segmentation errors, which degrade timestamp accuracy and downstream ASR performance. To address these challenges, we propose WhisperDiari, a unified framework for speaker diarization and ASR. We first construct LibriDiari, a dataset derived from LibriSpeech, containing 2–4 speaker mixed audio annotated with transcripts and speaker labels. WhisperDiari builds on the Whisper model, incorporating speaker adapters and Speaker Similarity Matrix Supervision to enhance speaker representation. In addition, a dedicated speaker decoder fuses speaker embeddings with contextual semantics from Whisper's decoder, enabling token-level diarization. This design effectively resolves segmentation ambiguity, aligns diarization with semantic units, and jointly models 'who speaks what and when', producing accurate, timestamped transcripts. We train the model on LibriDiari and evaluate it on both LibriDiari and the real-world AMI corpus. Experimental results demonstrate that WhisperDiari consistently outperforms state-of-the-art open-source baselines.

papers.title: MelTrim: Coarse-to-Fine Data Pruning for Speech Classification
papers.abstract: Dataset Pruning (DP) aims to construct a coreset that achieves performance comparable to the original, full dataset. However, few studies have explored DP in the context of Speech Classification (SC) tasks. Unlike image or text classification, SC is particularly challenging due to the difficulty in capturing the acoustic, semantic, and contextual representations. In this study, we propose a novel dataset pruning method for speech datasets, termed Meltrim, which uses a two-step coarse-to-fine framework designed to address these challenges. Specifically, in Step 1, Meltrim coarsely filters utterance-level redundant samples using DBSCAN clustering on Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCC) features, which are first flattened and then reduced in dimensionality using UMAP. In Step 2, we perform frame-level redundancy pruning for each utterance via utility pruning, which aims to eliminate irrelevant frames within each utterance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first dataset pruning approach designed for Speech Classification tasks, demonstrating outstanding performance compared to classical general DP methods. Notably, for the Speech Emotion Recognition, our method achieves up to a 49.5% improvement in WA (Weighted Accuracy) on the MEAD dataset. For the Speaker Identification tasks, it results in a 41.9% reduction in EER (Equal Error Rate) on the VoxCeleb1 dataset.

papers.title: Towards Fine-Grained and Multi-Granular Contrastive Language-Speech Pre-training
papers.abstract: Modeling fine-grained speaking styles remains challenging for language-speech representation pre-training, as existing speech-text models are typically trained with coarse captions or task-specific supervision, and scalable fine-grained style annotations are unavailable. We present FCaps, a large-scale dataset with fine-grained free-text style descriptions, encompassing 47k hours of speech and 19M fine-grained captions annotated via a novel end-to-end pipeline that directly grounds detailed captions in audio, thereby avoiding the error propagation caused by LLM-based rewriting in existing cascaded pipelines. Evaluations using LLM-as-a-judge demonstrate that our annotations surpass existing cascaded annotations in terms of correctness, coverage, and naturalness. Building on FCaps, we propose CLSP, a contrastive language-speech pre-trained model that integrates global and fine-grained supervision, enabling unified representations across multiple granularities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLSP learns fine-grained and multi-granular speech-text representations that perform reliably across global and fine-grained speech-text retrieval, zero-shot paralinguistic classification, and speech style similarity scoring, with strong alignment to human judgments. Code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/yfyeung/CLSP.

papers.title: LLM-Codec: Neural Audio Codec Meets Language Model Objectives
papers.abstract: Neural audio codecs are widely used as tokenizers for spoken language models, but they are optimized for waveform reconstruction rather than autoregressive prediction.This mismatch injects acoustically driven uncertainty into the discrete token space and increases language-model perplexity.We propose , which augments codec training with language-model-facing objectives while keeping both codec and LLM architectures unchanged.introduces (i) future token prediction with Medusa-style multi-step heads to encourage multi-step predictability, and (ii) semantic alignment that matches audio and text representations via a memory-bank contrastive loss.A differentiable Gumbel bridge enables end-to-end gradients from these objectives to the codec encoder.On SALMon speech coherence, token LMs trained on reach 61.6% accuracy (+12.1 points over AUV) while reducing perplexity 35 × .On Codec-SUPERB-tiny, improves speech Mel distance by 5.0% over AUV while simultaneously achieving the learnability gains, demonstrating that reconstruction fidelity and token predictability can be improved together.

papers.title: SEE: Signal Embedding Energy for Quantifying Noise Interference in Large Audio Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) have been widely applied in real-time scenarios, such as in-car assistants and online meeting comprehension. In practice, audio inputs are often corrupted by device and environmental noise, leading to performance degradation. However, existing LALM studies on noise lack quantitative analysis and rely mainly on intuition and empirical observation, thus failing to understand practical robustness. To address this issue, we introduce Signal Embedding Energy (SEE), a method for quantifying the impact of noise intensity on LALM inputs, enabling the differentiation of LALM robustness in real-world deployments. SEE introduces a perspective based on structured activation subspaces derived from the model’s internal representations, which more accurately captures its perception of noise than raw audio features. Across experiments, SEE exhibits a strong correlation with LALM performance, achieving a correlation of 0.98. Surprisingly, traditional audio denoising methods are only marginally effective for LALMs, and, in some cases, even increase SEE and impair performance. This suggests a mismatch between speech-centric denoising objectives and the noise sensitivity of modern LALMs. Therefore, we propose a mitigation strategy derived from SEE to denoise LALM inputs, outperforming existing denoising methods. This paper introduces a novel metric for noise quantification in LALMs, providing guidance for robustness improvements in real-world deployments.

papers.title: Dual-View Predictive Diffusion: Lightweight Speech Enhancement via Spectrogram-Image Synergy
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have recently set new benchmarks in Speech Enhancement (SE). However, most existing score-based models treat speech spectrograms merely as generic 2D images, applying uniform processing that ignores the intrinsic structural sparsity of audio, which results in inefficient spectral representation and prohibitive computational complexity. To bridge this gap, we propose **DVPD**, an extremely lightweight **D**ual-**V**iew **P**redictive **D**iffusion model, which uniquely exploits the dual nature of spectrograms as both visual textures and physical frequency-domain representations across both training and inference stages. Specifically, during training, we optimize spectral utilization via the Frequency-Adaptive Non-uniform Compression (FANC) encoder, which preserves critical low-frequency harmonics while pruning high-frequency redundancies. Simultaneously, we introduce a Lightweight Image-based Spectro-Awareness (LISA) module to capture features from a visual perspective with minimal overhead. During inference, we propose a Training-free Lossless Boost (TLB) strategy that leverages the same dual-view priors to refine generation quality without any additional fine-tuning. Extensive experiments across various benchmarks demonstrate that DVPD achieves state-of-the-art performance while requiring only **35%** of the parameters and **40%** of the inference MACs compared to SOTA lightweight model, PGUSE. These results highlight DVPD's superior ability to balance high-fidelity speech quality with extreme architectural efficiency. Code and audio samples are available at https://github.com/ke12345213/dvpd_demo

papers.title: Rolling Out Data Quality Overnight, without losing the plot: A Multi-Agent System for Speech Data Quality Management
papers.abstract: Quality management when creating large-scale speech datasets is essential for building reliable downstream models, yet verification pipelines are often brittle, domain-specific, and expertise-intensive. We introduce SpeechQM-Agent , a natural language-driven agentic framework that compiles user requirements into dependency-aware DAG workflows over modular tools for audio, transcript, and metadata verification. A central planner LLM enforces prerequisites and supports execution-time replanning (e.g., re-running failed steps or swapping tools), reducing manual pipeline engineering and improving robustness across heterogeneous vendor formats and multilingual settings. We also release SpeechQM-Dataset , a multilingual benchmark with controlled, vendor-inspired quality artifacts spanning 24 verification tasks. Across experiments, SpeechQM-Agent attains 80-90% agreement with expert verification while requiring <20% of the cost and time of manual QC, and we further validate transfer to real vendor-supplied corpora. Planner LLM comparisons highlight fidelity-efficiency trade-offs.

papers.title: REINA: Regularized Entropy Information-Based Loss for Efficient Simultaneous Speech Translation
papers.abstract:
Simultaneous Speech Translation (SimulST) systems stream in audio while simultaneously emitting translated text or speech. Such systems face the significant challenge of balancing translation quality and latency. We introduce a strategy to optimize this tradeoff: wait for more input only if you gain information by doing so. Based on this strategy, we present Regularized Entropy INformation Adaptation (REINA), a novel loss to train an adaptive policy using an existing non-streaming translation model. We derive REINA from information theory principles and show that REINA helps push the reported Pareto frontier of the latency/quality tradeoff over prior works.
Utilizing REINA, we train a SimulST model on French, Spanish and German, both from and into English. Training on only open source or synthetically generated data, we achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) streaming results for models of comparable size. We also introduce a metric for streaming efficiency, quantitatively showing REINA improves the latency/quality trade-off by as much as 21 percent compared to prior approaches, normalized against non-streaming baseline BLEU scores.

papers.title: Dual-Reasoner: Bridging Interleaved Atomicity and Streaming Latency via Thinking-while-Talking
papers.abstract: Integrating explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) into end-to-end spoken dialogue models enhances intelligence but incurs prohibitive latency. While the "Thinking-while-Talking" paradigm alleviates this delay, it fundamentally compromises block atomicity, severing the logical connection between interleaved thought and speech. To address this, we present Dual-Reasoner, employing a Streaming Masking Mechanism underpinned by our Dual-Think-30k dataset to guarantee uninterrupted audio streaming. Crucially, to strictly align the fragmented thinking blocks to service speech generation, we introduce the Atomic-Consistency Restoration framework. To secure comprehensive capabilities in high-difficulty reasoning, this mechanism utilizes a quadruple-constraint system to reconstruct logical atomicity, ensuring that "think" chunks act as a rigorous anchor for "talk" outputs. Experimental results demonstrate that Dual-Reasoner achieves comprehensive reasoning enhancements within ultra-low latency constraints: it elevates the VoiceBench score from 67.24 to 73.41 over the baseline, while significantly reducing the Time-to-First-Audio (TTFA) from 20.35s to 3.65s and the Real-Time Factor (RTF) from 7.04 to 1.05.

papers.title: An Exploration of Mamba for Speech Self-Supervised Models
papers.abstract: While Mamba has demonstrated strong performance in language modeling, its potential as a speech self-supervised learning (SSL) model remains underexplored, with prior studies limited to isolated tasks. To address this, we explore Mamba-based HuBERT models as alternatives to Transformer-based SSL architectures. Leveraging the linear-time Selective State Space, these models enable fine-tuning on long-context ASR with significantly lower compute. Moreover, they show superior performance when fine-tuned for streaming ASR. Beyond fine-tuning, these models show competitive performance on SUPERB probing benchmarks, particularly in causal settings. Our analysis shows that they yield higher-quality quantized representations and capture speaker-related features more distinctly than Transformer-based models. These findings highlight Mamba-based SSL as a promising and complementary direction for long-sequence modeling, real-time speech modeling, and speech unit extraction. The codebase is available at https://github.com/hckuo145/Mamba-based-HuBERT.

papers.title: SpidR-Adapt: A Universal Speech Representation Model for Few-Shot Adaptation
papers.abstract: Human infants, with only a few hundred hours of speech exposure, acquire basic units of new languages, highlighting a striking efficiency gap compared to the data-hungry self-supervised speech models. To address this gap, this paper introduces SpidR-Adapt for rapid adaptation of speech units to new languages using minimal unlabeled data. We cast such low-resource speech representation learning as a meta-learning problem and construct a multi-task adaptive pre-training (MAdaPT) protocol which formulates the adaptation process as a bi-level optimization framework. To enable scalable meta-training under this framework, we propose a novel heuristic solution, first-order bi-level optimization (FOBLO), avoiding heavy computation costs. Finally, we stabilize meta-training by using a robust initialization through interleaved supervision which alternates self-supervised and supervised objectives. Empirically, SpidR-Adapt achieves rapid gains in phonemic discriminability (ABX) and downstream spoken language modeling scores (sWUGGY, sBLIMP, tSC), surpassing in-domain toplines after training on less than 1h of target-language audio and delivering 100× greater data efficiency than standard multi-task training.. These findings highlight a practical, architecture-agnostic path toward biologically inspired, data-efficient representations. We open-source the training code and model checkpoints at https://github.com/facebookresearch/spidr-adapt.

papers.title: SPEAR: A Unified SSL Framework for Learning Speech and Audio Representations
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has significantly advanced acoustic representation learning. However, most existing models are optimised for either speech or audio event understanding, resulting in a persistent gap between these two domains. We address this gap with SPEAR (SPEech and Audio Representations), a self-supervised framework that distils complementary knowledge from a speech-focused SSL teacher and a general-audio SSL teacher into a single unified model. SPEAR applies multi-codebook vector quantisation to continuous teacher representations to produce fine-grained discrete tokens that capture both semantic and acoustic information. To effectively integrate these heterogeneous representations, SPEAR jointly predicts them given a masked input with an asymmetric pre-training loss. We further improve robustness in complex sound scenes through a novel token mixing mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SPEAR consistently outperforms existing unified speech and audio models. SPEAR establishes a new state-of-the-art on the SUPERB benchmark, surpassing WavLM Large on 12 of 15 tasks, while achieving competitive performance on the HEAR benchmark. These results position SPEAR as a versatile foundation for general-purpose speech and audio representation learning. The code and pre-trained models will be released.

papers.title: AHAMask: Reliable Task Specification for Large Audio Language Models Without Instructions
papers.abstract: Although current large audio language models (LALMs)  extend text large language models (LLMs) with generic acoustic understanding abilities, they usually suffer from prompt sensitivity, where different instructions of the same intention can yield drastically different outcomes. In this work, we propose AHAMask, where we simply mask some of the attention heads in the decoder-only LLM backbone of LALMs, to trigger specific acoustic task functionalities without instructions. These masks are efficiently obtained by training on an LALM, with the number of trainable parameters equal to the attention head count in its LLM backbone. We show by experiments that applying such selective attention head masks achieves comparable or even better performance than using instructions, either on single or composite tasks. Besides achieving reliable acoustic task specification for LALMs, this also reveals that LALMs exhibit certain ``functional pathways'' in their attention heads.

papers.title: Minibatch selection for Language Models via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
papers.abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selecting minibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains. Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on computationally expensive proxy models to learn continuous domain weights. We propose PartitionSel, a cross-domain minibatch selection approach that  maximizes a validation-guided gradient-matching utility under per-domain budgets encoded as a partition-matroid constraint. By coupling the per-domain budgets through a single utility, PartitionSel is designed to reduce redundancy in selections across domains. The proposed objective is weakly submodular and admits an orthogonal matching pursuit algorithm with provable approximation guarantees. Empirically, we evaluate PartitionSel for minibatch selection during the fine-tuning of Qwen2.5 and Llama-3 on MetaMathQA and Mol-Instructions. PartitionSel achieves robust gains over per-domain and domain-agnostic baselines on both benchmarks. It also reduces the number of conflicting gradient pairs within each batch, indicating that the cross-domain coupling translates into more compatible training updates.

papers.title: SepPrune: Structured Pruning for Efficient Deep Speech Separation
papers.abstract: Although deep learning has substantially advanced speech separation in recent years, most existing studies continue to prioritize separation quality while overlooking computational efficiency, an essential factor for low-latency speech processing in real-time applications. In this paper, we propose SepPrune, the first structured pruning framework specifically designed to compress deep speech separation models and reduce their computational cost. SepPrune begins by analyzing the computational structure of a given model to identify layers with the highest computational burden. It then introduces a differentiable masking strategy to enable gradient-driven channel selection. Based on the learned masks, SepPrune prunes redundant channels and fine-tunes the remaining parameters to recover performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this learnable pruning paradigm yields substantial advantages for channel pruning in speech separation models, outperforming existing methods. Notably, a model pruned with SepPrune can recover 85% of the performance of a pre-trained model (trained over hundreds of epochs) with only one epoch of fine-tuning, and achieves convergence 36x faster than training from scratch.

llm_ranked.title_zh: 弥合多模态LLM中的时序差距：为音视频语音识别深度堆叠时序Token
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多模态LLM存在时序差距，视觉编码器时序建模弱，LLM解码层语义退化。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在视觉编码器引入时序感知注意力与旋转位置嵌入，解码端堆叠时序Token。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在音视频语音识别中，框架有效提升噪声下的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 通过深度时序Token堆叠，本工作增强了多模态LLM的时序建模能力，推动了音视频ASR发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision and speech multimodal learning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: spoken dialogue model with chain-of-thought reasoning while talking, reducing latency
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 带思维链的口语对话模型，边说边想，降低延迟
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 带思维链的口语对话模型，边说边想，降低延迟
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes Dual-Reasoner, which integrates chain-of-thought reasoning into end-to-end spoken dialogue models, using a streaming masking mechanism and atomic consistency restoration to balance reasoning depth and low latency.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对端到端口语对话模型集成思维链（CoT）导致高延迟的问题，本文提出Dual-Reasoner，采用流式掩码机制保证音频流不中断，并引入原子一致性恢复框架对齐碎片化思维块，实现边说边想。实验结果显示该模型在保持推理深度的同时大幅降低延迟，为高性能实时口语对话系统提供了可行方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Dual-Reasoner：通过边说边想弥合交织原子性与流式延迟
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 口语对话集成CoT提升智能但延迟过高，现有边说边想方案损害思维原子性。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出流式掩码机制和原子一致性恢复，实现边推理边生成语音。
llm_ranked.result_cn: Dual-Reasoner平衡了推理深度与延迟，优于基线模型。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该框架为低延迟、高智力的口语对话AI设计提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: unified model for both speech understanding and generation using dual speech tokens
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用双语音Token的统一语音理解与生成模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用双语音Token的统一语音理解与生成模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes DualSpeechLM, a unified model that handles both speech understanding and generation by modeling dual speech tokens to bridge modality gap and align acoustic and semantic levels.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对构建统一语音理解与生成模型面临的模态鸿沟和不同任务对信息粒度需求差异的挑战，本文提出DualSpeechLM，采用双语音Token建模，分别捕捉高层语义与细节声学特征，解耦理解与生成。实验表明该模型在ASR和TTS任务上均取得优异性能，迈出了语音全功能大模型的重要一步。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DualSpeechLM：通过双语音Token建模构建统一语音理解与生成大模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 统一语音理解与生成困难，模态鸿沟大，不同任务信息需求冲突。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计双语音Token分别服务于理解和生成，解耦声学与语义表示。
llm_ranked.result_cn: DualSpeechLM在语音识别与合成上均表现优异。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 双Token建模为语音通用大模型提供了有效方案，促进了语音交互统一范式的进步。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 语音识别、合成、交互、语音大模型、多模态大模型, especially work that connects or combines: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques; text to speech quality enhancement methods; voice user interface conversational AI design; large-scale self-supervised speech model training; vision and speech multimodal learning; data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training; advanced training methodologies for large speech models; techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy; efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multimodal ASR framework using semantics and spectrogram cues for noise robustness
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用语义和频谱线索的多模态ASR框架，增强噪声鲁棒性
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用语义和频谱线索的多模态ASR框架，增强噪声鲁棒性
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes Speech-MLM, a multimodal ASR framework that reframes ASR as semantics-guided speech reconstruction, integrating speech, spectrogram-derived visual cues, and textual variants to handle severe acoustic degradation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对严重噪声导致语音结构瓦解、ASR输出不可靠的问题，本文提出Speech-MLM，将ASR重构为语义引导的语音重建任务，融合语音、频谱视觉线索和文本变体以增强鲁棒性。实验表明该框架在强噪声环境下显著提升识别准确率，为噪声鲁棒ASR提供了语义驱动的多模态新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 像人一样倾听：语义引导的噪声鲁棒多模态语音识别
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 强噪声下语言结构崩溃，现有ASR输出不可靠。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建Speech-MLM多模态框架，结合语音、频谱和文本进行语义引导重建。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在噪声环境下显著提高ASR准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 语义引导的多模态框架有效提升了语音识别的噪声鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multi-agent system for automated speech data quality verification and pipeline management
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于自动化语音数据质量验证和流程管理的多智能体系统
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于自动化语音数据质量验证和流程管理的多智能体系统
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces SpeechQM-Agent, an LLM-driven agentic framework that compiles requirements into DAG workflows for speech data quality verification, handling audio, transcript, and metadata checks with execution-time replanning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对大规模语音数据集质量管理流程脆弱且依赖专家的问题，本文提出SpeechQM-Agent多智能体框架，将用户需求编译为依赖感知的DAG工作流，自动执行音频、文本和元数据校验，并支持运行时重规划。该框架提高了多语言、多格式数据的验证鲁棒性，并发布了验证数据集，为语音数据预处理提供了高效自动化工具。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 一夜之间实现数据质量管理，不失主线：面向语音数据质量管理的多智能体系统
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音数据质量管理流程依赖人工，易出错且难以扩展。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建由LLM驱动的多智能体系统，自动编译需求为可重规划的DAG校验工作流。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 框架在多语言多格式数据上提高了验证鲁棒性和效率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SpeechQM-Agent为语音数据质量保障提供了可扩展的自动化解决方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: systematic study on speech tokenizers for improving synthesis quality in LLM-centric speech generation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 系统研究提升LLM语音生成质量的语音分词器设计
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 系统研究提升LLM语音生成质量的语音分词器设计
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Systematically investigates speech tokenizer designs in LLM-centric speech generation, finding that decoupled tokenization and multi-token prediction significantly improve cross-modal alignment and synthesis quality.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音语言模型中语音分词器设计对生成质量的影响尚不清晰的问题，本文系统比较了耦合、半解耦与全解耦分词方案，发现解耦分词能改善跨模态对齐与合成质量。进一步引入多Token预测解决信息密度不匹配，有效提升语音生成的自然度和可懂度。该研究为语音生成模型的分词器选择提供了明确的指导原则，推动高质量语音合成发展。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 什么才是面向LLM语音生成的优秀语音分词器？一项系统研究
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: LLM语音生成中分词器设计对合成质量的影响缺乏系统理解。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 公平比较不同分词器设计，提出解耦分词与多Token预测方案。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 解耦分词和多Token预测显著提升对齐和合成质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为LLM语音生成的分词器设计提供了系统性建议，推动高质量语音合成。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Multimodal in-context learning improves ASR for unseen low-resource languages
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多模态上下文学习提升未见低资源语言的语音识别
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多模态上下文学习提升未见低资源语言的语音识别
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Investigates multimodal in-context learning with speech LLMs for ASR of low-resource languages, showing effectiveness and cross-lingual transfer benefits.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 自动语音识别（ASR）对世界语言覆盖率不足，尤其低资源语言数据稀缺。本文研究如何通过多模态上下文学习（MICL）利用语音大语言模型（LLM）提升未见语言的语音识别能力。在Phi-4和Qwen3-Omni两个语音LLM上，对三种濒危语言进行实验，发现MICL能有效结合语音和文本模态实现跨领域学习，且跨语言迁移进一步提升了效率。这项工作证明了语音LLM的少样本泛化潜力，为低资源语言ASR的快速发展提供了新思路，对全球语言保护和人机交互具有积极意义。该方法无需大量标注数据，即可快速适配新语言。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向低资源语言语音识别的多模态上下文学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音识别主要覆盖高资源语言，低资源语言因数据稀缺发展受限，上下文学习多局限于文本单模态。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 探索语音LLM的多模态上下文学习（MICL），利用语音和文本模态提升低资源语言ASR，并引入跨语言迁移。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在三种濒危语言上，MICL有效提升ASR性能，跨语言迁移进一步提高效率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 多模态上下文学习为低资源语言语音识别提供了数据高效的新路径，展示了语音LLM的强大泛化能力。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: compresses audio-visual tokens based on attention dynamics for efficient multimodal reasoning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于注意力动态压缩音视频令牌以实现高效多模态推理
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于注意力动态压缩音视频令牌以实现高效多模态推理
llm_ranked.tldr_en: PRIM proposes a dynamic token compression framework for large multimodal models that adaptively prunes audio-visual representations based on attention scores and instruction relevance, reducing inference cost while maintaining multimodal understanding accuracy.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 处理长时音视频内容时，大模型因令牌数量过多导致计算和内存开销巨大。PRIM框架提出基于注意力动态和指令相关性的协同令牌压缩方法，自适应地剪枝冗余音视频表示。实验表明，该方法显著降低推理开销，同时保持多模态理解性能，为高效音视频处理提供了新途径。
llm_ranked.title_zh: PRIM：面向高效大模型的多模态协同动态令牌压缩
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 长时音视频处理导致多模态大模型推理代价过高，现有统一压缩忽略模态差异。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计基于注意力动态和指令相关性的协同压缩框架，自适应剪枝音视频令牌。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个多模态基准上降低了计算和内存开销，同时保持准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: PRIM实现了高效的音视频多模态推理，为资源受限场景下的应用提供了可能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision and speech multimodal learning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: proposes a two-step dataset pruning method for speech classification using MFCC features
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于MFCC特征的两步语音分类数据集剪枝方法
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于MFCC特征的两步语音分类数据集剪枝方法
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MelTrim introduces a coarse-to-fine data pruning method for speech classification, using MFCC clustering for coarse filtering and further refinement, achieving competitive accuracy with a smaller coreset.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 语音分类任务中数据集剪枝研究不足，传统方法难以捕获声学语义表示。本文提出MelTrim，通过粗到细两步框架：先用DBSCAN对MFCC特征聚类粗滤冗余样本，再进一步精细筛选。实验表明，该方法构建的核心集在多个语音分类任务上性能接近全量数据，为高效语音模型训练提供了数据预处理方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MelTrim：语音分类的粗到细数据剪枝
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音分类中数据集剪枝研究匮乏，需有效捕获声学语义表示进行样本筛选。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于MFCC的DBSCAN聚类粗滤和精细筛选的两步数据剪枝方法。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个语音分类基准上，用少量核心集达到近似全量数据的性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: MelTrim为语音数据处理提供了高效剪枝技术，有助于减少模型训练成本。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: enhances spoken dialogue models' intelligence and expressiveness through adaptive hybrid post-training
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过自适应混合后训练增强语音对话模型的智能和表现力
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过自适应混合后训练增强语音对话模型的智能和表现力
llm_ranked.tldr_en: WavAlign improves end-to-end spoken dialogue models by analyzing obstacles in reward modeling and rollout sampling, and proposes an adaptive hybrid post-training method that combines imitation learning and preference optimization to boost intelligence and expressiveness.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 端到端语音对话模型在智能和表现力上不及预期，直接应用在线强化学习存在困难。本文分析奖励建模和采样中的难点，提出自适应混合后训练方法，结合模仿学习与偏好优化，在共享参数更新下协调密集语音生成与稀疏偏好监督。实验显示，模型自然度和对话质量显著提升。
llm_ranked.title_zh: WavAlign：通过自适应混合后训练增强语音对话模型的智能与表现力
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有开源语音对话模型在智能和表现力方面表现不足，强化学习迁移面临挑战。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 分析奖励建模与采样障碍，提出结合模仿学习和偏好优化的自适应混合后训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 模型在智能和表现力指标上获得显著提升，优于原有方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: WavAlign为语音对话模型的后训练提供了有效策略，推动了语音交互技术的发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: enables spoken language models to think while listening for low-latency spoken interaction
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使语音语言模型在聆听时进行思考，实现低延迟语音交互
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使语音语言模型在聆听时进行思考，实现低延迟语音交互
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SHANKS proposes an inference framework that allows spoken language models to generate chain-of-thought reasoning while streaming speech input, enabling real-time interaction and reducing response latency.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有语音语言模型在用户说完后才开始思考，导致交互延迟。受人类边听边想启发，SHANKS框架让模型在接收语音片段时同步生成非发声的思维链推理，利用遮蔽语音预测损失进行流式训练。实验表明，该方法显著降低响应延迟，提升了对话的自然度和连贯性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SHANKS：语音语言模型的同步聆听与思考
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 解决语音模型因等待用户结束而造成的响应延迟和缺乏实时交互问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计流式输入固定时长语音块并同步生成思维链的推理框架，结合流式训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个对话场景中实现了低延迟响应，交互流畅性大幅提高。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SHANKS为语音交互模型提供了更贴近人类的实时推理能力，革新了语音对话体验。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: proposes spiking transformer for energy-efficient and accurate speech command recognition
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出脉冲Transformer用于高能效和准确的语音命令识别
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出脉冲Transformer用于高能效和准确的语音命令识别
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SpikCommander introduces a fully spiking transformer with multi-view temporal attention for speech command recognition, achieving high accuracy with extreme energy efficiency compared to traditional models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有脉冲网络在语音命令识别中难以捕获丰富的时间依赖性。本文提出SpikCommander，引入多视角脉冲时序自注意力模块和全脉冲Transformer架构，有效建模语音命令的时序上下文。在多个数据集上，达到与人工神经网络相当的准确率且能耗极低，为边缘设备语音识别提供了高性能低功耗方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpikCommander：基于多视角学习的高性能脉冲Transformer用于高效语音命令识别
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 脉冲网络语音命令识别受限于时间建模不足和二元脉冲表示的稀疏性。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计多视角脉冲时序自注意力模块，构建全脉冲Transformer进行语音命令识别。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在语音命令识别任务中达到先进准确率，同时保持极低能耗。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SpikCommander展示了脉冲网络在高效语音识别上的潜力，适合资源受限环境。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy

llm_ranked.evidence_en: uses multi-modal retrieval to select relevant context for improving conversational ASR accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用多模态检索选择相关上下文提升对话语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用多模态检索选择相关上下文提升对话语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: To address context noise in conversational LLM-ASR, the paper proposes a multi-modal retrieval-and-selection augmented method that retrieves relevant historical context, improving recognition accuracy while reducing computational cost.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 对话语音识别中，固定数量上下文或全部历史会引入噪声和计算负担。本文提出多模态检索增强的LLM-ASR方法，通过检索与当前语音语义相关的历史上下文进行选择，有效提升识别准确率。实验表明，该方法在复杂对话场景下优于现有方法，实现了更高效和准确的语音识别。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 以少听多：面向对话式大模型语音识别的多模态检索增强
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法使用固定长度或全部历史上下文导致语音识别混乱和计算开销。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出多模态检索与选择模块，动态获取与当前语音相关的历史对话上下文。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在对话ASR基准上提高了识别准确率并减少了无关上下文干扰。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该方法为对话语音识别提供了智能化上下文利用范式，提升了实用性能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: improves audio codec for language model to enhance speech synthesis quality
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 改进音频编解码器以提升语言模型语音合成质量
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 改进音频编解码器以提升语言模型语音合成质量
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes LLM-Codec, augmenting neural audio codec training with language-model-facing objectives (future token prediction and semantic alignment) to reduce perplexity and improve speech generation in spoken language models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 当前神经音频编解码器面向波形重建优化，与自回归语言模型存在失配，导致离散token空间不确定性高。该论文提出LLM-Codec，在不改变模型结构的前提下，引入未来token预测和语义对齐目标，并利用Gumbel桥实现端到端梯度更新。在SALMon语音生成任务上验证了该方法能有效降低语言模型困惑度，提升合成语音质量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: LLM-Codec：融合语言模型目标的神经音频编解码器
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 音频编解码器与语言模型目标不匹配，影响语音合成质量。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 引入未来token预测和语义对齐损失，用Gumbel桥端到端训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 提升了语音语言模型的预测能力，改善了合成语音质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: LLM-Codec为语音合成提供了更适配的编解码方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: benchmark for evaluating paralinguistic expressiveness in speech-to-speech conversational AI
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 评估语音对话AI副语言表达能力的基准
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 评估语音对话AI副语言表达能力的基准
llm_ranked.tldr_en: S2S-Arena is a speech-native benchmark evaluating instruction-following S2S models on semantic understanding and paralinguistic cues like prosody and emotion, with a four-level protocol and two-stage data pipeline.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有语音到语音（S2S）模型评测多依赖文本指标，忽略副语言信息。该论文提出S2S-Arena，一个专为S2S模型设计的评测基准，在四个交互复杂度层次下系统评估模型的语义理解和副语言表达能力，采用两阶段数据构造流程。该基准为提升语音对话AI的自然度和表现力提供了关键评估工具。
llm_ranked.title_zh: S2S-Arena：评估语音到语音模型的副语言指令遵循能力
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 当前S2S评测缺乏对副语言线索的评估，如韵律和情绪。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计四级交互协议和两阶段数据构造流程，构建语音原生基准。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 基准能系统揭示S2S模型在副语言表达上的能力差异。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为语音交互AI提供更全面的评估维度，促进拟人化对话发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: self-reflection mechanism to improve speech recognition accuracy by avoiding noisy hypotheses
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 自反思机制避免噪声假设，提升语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 自反思机制避免噪声假设，提升语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Speech-Hands learns a self-reflection decision to prevent degrading ASR performance when fine-tuning on multiple tasks, using an agentic action to selectively trust external audio perception.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文发现，将全模型同时微调在语音识别和外部音频理解任务上会导致性能下降，因为模型易被噪声假设误导。为此提出Speech-Hands框架，学习一个自反思决策原语，使模型能判断何时信任自身预测、何时依赖外部感知。在语音识别任务中验证该机制能有效防止外部错误干扰，提升模型在多任务学习下的鲁棒性与准确率。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Speech-Hands：一种面向语音识别与音频推理的自反思语音智能体方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多任务微调时，语音识别模型易受噪声假设误导而性能下降。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 引入可学习的自反思原语，让智能体在自身预测与外部感知间进行决策。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在语音识别与音频推理任务中，自反思机制提升了模型对抗噪声的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 这种智能体式行动机制可泛化，为通用全感知模型提供稳定训练方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: meta-learning for rapid adaptation of speech units with minimal unlabeled data
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 元学习实现最少无标注数据的快速语音单元适配
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 元学习实现最少无标注数据的快速语音单元适配
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SpidR-Adapt uses meta-learning and multi-task adaptive pre-training (MAdaPT) with first-order bi-level optimization to enable universal speech representations that adapt to new languages with few samples.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 人类婴儿仅需数百小时语音暴露即可习得新语言的基本单元，突显了自监督语音模型依赖大量数据的效率差距。该论文提出SpidR-Adapt，将少资源语音表示学习建模为元学习问题，设计多任务自适应预训练（MAdaPT）协议，并通过一阶双层优化（FOBLO）实现可扩展的元训练。实验证明，该方法能以极少未标注语音数据快速适配到新语言，显著提升了跨语言语音表示的泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpidR-Adapt：面向少样本适配的通用语音表示模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 当前自监督语音模型数据需求大，难以快速适应新语言。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出多任务自适应预训练协议MAdaPT，并用一阶双层优化算法FOBLO加速。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在低资源场景下，少量数据即可快速适配语音单元，效果显著。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为低资源语音处理的快速部署提供了高效灵活的表示学习方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: large-scale self-supervised speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: enhances factual accuracy in full-duplex speech conversational AI with retrieval
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过检索增强全双工语音对话AI的事实准确性
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过检索增强全双工语音对话AI的事实准确性
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Moshi-RAG combines a compact full-duplex speech model with asynchronous knowledge retrieval to improve factual grounding while maintaining real-time interactivity, using selective retrieval for knowledge-demanding queries.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 全双工语音语言模型虽然提升了对话自然度，但其事实准确性仍待提高。该论文提出Moshi-RAG，采用模块化设计，将紧凑的全双工语音交互接口与异步知识检索相结合。模型能识别需要外部知识的查询，并基于检索信息生成回答，在保持实时交互性的同时，显著提升回答的事实可靠性。这为构建既自然又可信的语音助手提供了新途径。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MoshiRAG：面向全双工语音语言模型的异步知识检索
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 全双工语音模型面临事实准确性挑战，扩大模型则推理延迟不可接受。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计异步检索框架，使模型在需要时访问外部知识源而不影响实时性。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在保持低延迟的同时，提升了模型回答的事实正确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为自然交互与事实准确兼备的语音AI提供了高效融合方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Uses multi-level evaluator to correct erroneous speech segments and align preferences for TTS quality
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用多级评估器纠正错误语音片段并对齐偏好以提升TTS质量
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用多级评估器纠正错误语音片段并对齐偏好以提升TTS质量
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper introduces Vox-Evaluator, a multi-level evaluator that identifies erroneous segments and provides holistic quality assessment to improve zero-shot TTS stability and fidelity, achieving more robust speech synthesis.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对零样本文本到语音合成中存在的发音错误、噪声和质量退化问题，本文提出Vox-Evaluator多级评估器，能够定位错误片段边界并提供整体质量评估，通过指导错误纠正和偏好对齐提升合成的稳定性和保真度，实验表明所提方法有效增强了TTS模型的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于多级评估器的零样本文本到语音稳定性与保真度增强
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 零样本TTS仍存在稳定性与保真度不足，如发音错误和可闻噪声。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出Vox-Evaluator多级评估器，识别错误片段并指导纠正，进行偏好对齐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明有效提升零样本TTS的稳定性与保真度。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 多级评估器为提升TTS鲁棒性提供了有效途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Proposes autoregressive TTS via next-distribution prediction, eliminating diffusion, to improve quality
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过下一分布预测实现自回归语音合成，消除扩散组件以提升质量
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过下一分布预测实现自回归语音合成，消除扩散组件以提升质量
llm_ranked.tldr_en: KALL-E is an autoregressive TTS model that predicts the next distribution of continuous speech frames using Flow-VAE and a single AR Transformer, eliminating diffusion components and achieving superior synthesis quality.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有TTS方法多依赖扩散模型或离散语音标记，KALL-E提出一种新的自回归框架，利用Flow-VAE提取连续潜在表示，直接用AR Transformer预测语音分布，避免了扩散组件，通过KL散度优化实现高质量语音合成，实验表明合成质量优越。
llm_ranked.title_zh: KALL-E：基于下一分布预测的自回归语音合成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有TTS方法依赖扩散组件或离散标记，存在局限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用Flow-VAE提取连续语音表示，AR Transformer预测下一分布。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验证明KALL-E合成质量优越，且能适应连续语音建模。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 自回归分布预测为TTS提供了一种高效且高质量的方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Integrates convex optimization for accent-robust language detection to improve ASR in spoken dialogue systems
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 集成凸优化实现口音鲁棒的语言检测，提升语音对话系统中的语音识别
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 集成凸优化实现口音鲁棒的语言检测，提升语音对话系统中的语音识别
llm_ranked.tldr_en: The paper proposes CLD, a convex optimization framework for language detection in ASR, addressing low-resource accent variation and preventing cascading failures in spoken dialogue systems.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 全球化带来多样化的语音变体，现有语音对话系统在方言和口音上经常失败。本文提出凸语言检测框架CLD，利用凸优化技术在多GPU上高效实现，通过交替方向乘子法处理高维语音数据，在低资源条件下有效提升口音鲁棒的语言识别，从而防止下游任务中的级联错误，实验表明其显著优于标准微调。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向低资源口音鲁棒语音识别的凸语言检测
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 方言和口音多样性导致语言检测错误，引发对话系统级联失效。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于凸优化的语言检测框架CLD，利用ADMM高效实现。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在低资源口音场景下显著提升语言识别准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 凸优化为低资源语音识别提供了一种高效鲁棒的语言检测方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Proposes adapter-based method to improve multilingual ASR and ST, reducing negative transfer
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出基于适配器的方法改进多语言语音识别与翻译，减少负迁移
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出基于适配器的方法改进多语言语音识别与翻译，减少负迁移
llm_ranked.tldr_en: LCMA-SRT augments hierarchical transducers with language-conditional mixture-of-experts adapters to enable efficient multilingual many-to-many ASR and ST, mitigating negative transfer and improving performance.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 分层换能器在多语言多对多语音识别与翻译中面临负迁移和不稳定生成问题。本文提出LCMA-SRT，引入语言条件混合专家适配器，使模型能够动态调整参数处理不同语言方向，在维持参数效率的同时有效缓解负迁移，在多个语种对上显著提升了ASR和ST的性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: LCMA-SRT：面向联合多语言语音识别与翻译的语言条件混合专家适配器
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多语言分层换能器存在负迁移和训练不稳定。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 引入语言条件MoE适配器增强分层换能器。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多语言ASR和ST任务上性能显著提升，负迁移得到缓解。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 适配器方法为多语言语音处理提供了参数高效的解。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: enabling LLMs to conduct structured and explanation-based speech quality evaluation for synthetic speech
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用大语言模型对合成语音进行结构化和可解释的质量评估
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用大语言模型对合成语音进行结构化和可解释的质量评估
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SpeechLLM-as-Judges, a paradigm using LLMs for interpretable speech quality evaluation, with large-scale multilingual dataset SpeechEval and model SQ-LLM.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 提出SpeechLLM-as-Judges范式，利用大语言模型进行结构化、可解释的语音质量评估，构建多语言多任务数据集SpeechEval并训练SQ-LLM模型，为语音合成质量评估提供通用且可解释的新方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpeechLLM-as-Judges：迈向通用且可解释的语音质量评估
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 生成语音技术发展迅速，但合成语音质量的感知评估仍缺乏可解释性和泛化性。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SpeechLLM-as-Judges范式，利用大语言模型进行结构化、解释性的语音质量评估，并构建了多语言多任务数据集SpeechEval。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 基于SpeechEval训练的SQ-LLM模型在质量评估、比较、改进建议和深度伪造检测等任务上实现了可解释的评估。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作为语音质量评估提供了通用且可解释的新范式，有助于推动语音合成技术的进步。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: MoE-CTC jointly promotes expert specialization and generalization for accented speech recognition
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 混合专家模型结合中间CTC监督，提升口音语音识别精度
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 混合专家模型结合中间CTC监督，提升口音语音识别精度
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces MoE-CTC, a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with intermediate CTC supervision to improve ASR for accented speech, enabling expert specialization without accent labels at inference.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对口音语音识别性能下降的问题，提出带有中间CTC监督的混合专家模型MoE-CTC，通过训练时口音感知路由促进专家专业化，推理时无需口音标签，在多个口音数据集上显著提升识别准确率。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 带中间CTC监督的混合专家模型用于口音语音识别
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有ASR模型对高资源英语变体过拟合，导致对重口音或未见口音识别性能严重下降。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出MoE-CTC架构，利用中间CTC监督和逐步从口音感知路由过渡到无标签路由，促使专家学习特定口音模式。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个口音英语数据集上，MoE-CTC相比基线模型显著降低了词错误率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该方法有效提升了口音语音识别的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为低资源口音提供解决方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multimodal LLM integrating speech and text with modality-aware mixture of experts
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 集成语音和文本的多模态大语言模型，采用模态感知混合专家架构
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 集成语音和文本的多模态大语言模型，采用模态感知混合专家架构
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MoST is a multimodal large language model that seamlessly integrates speech and text via Modality-Aware Mixture of Experts, with specialized and shared experts for cross-modal transfer.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 提出MoST多模态大语言模型，通过模态感知混合专家架构融合语音与文本处理，利用模态特定专家和共享专家实现模态内学习与跨模态信息传递，有效提升多模态任务性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MoST：通过模态感知混合专家混合语音与文本
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有多模态模型通常用相同参数处理不同模态，忽略了语音与文本的表征差异。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计模态感知混合专家（MAMoE），包含模态特定专家组和共享专家，根据输入类型路由到不同专家。
llm_ranked.result_cn: MoST在语音识别、文本理解等任务上表现出色，证明其有效融合模态。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该模型为语音-文本多模态学习提供了有效框架，推动大语言模型向真正多模态拓展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 语音识别、合成、交互、语音大模型、多模态大模型, especially work that connects or combines: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques; text to speech quality enhancement methods; voice user interface conversational AI design; large-scale self-supervised speech model training; vision and speech multimodal learning; data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training; advanced training methodologies for large speech models; techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy; efficiency improvements for speech synthesis and inference speed.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: uses visual context from slides to improve speech recognition, addressing visual interference
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用幻灯片视觉信息增强语音识别，解决视觉干扰问题
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用幻灯片视觉信息增强语音识别，解决视觉干扰问题
llm_ranked.tldr_en: VAPO is a visually-anchored policy optimization method for slide-enhanced speech recognition using omni-modal LLMs, mitigating visual interference by enforcing a Look-then-Listen inference chain.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对幻灯片增强语音识别中的视觉干扰问题，提出视觉锚定策略优化VAPO，通过解耦的Look-then-Listen推理链重塑模型推理，避免无关文本幻觉，提升转录准确性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VAPO：基于全模态大语言模型的端到端幻灯片增强语音识别
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 全模态大语言模型在幻灯片增强语音识别中存在视觉干扰，模型偏向可见文本导致产生无关幻觉。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计视觉锚定策略优化，将推理链分解为先思考提取视觉先验再回答的两阶段，用视觉先验作为语义锚点指导转录。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明VAPO有效减少了幻觉，显著提高了幻灯片场景下的语音识别准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为利用视觉信号辅助语音识别提供了新思路，推动了全模态大模型在真实场景中的应用。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision and speech multimodal learning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: uses sparse autoencoder to disentangle speech representations for dual-output ASR, improving accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用稀疏自编码器解耦语音表征，提升双输出语音识别精度
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用稀疏自编码器解耦语音表征，提升双输出语音识别精度
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SODA integrates a sparse autoencoder into a dual-output ASR framework to disentangle competing representations, improving both surface and meaning-oriented transcription accuracy.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对双输出语音识别中表征干扰问题，提出SODA框架，嵌入稀疏自编码器并在编码器输出和SAE潜空间施加辅助CTC监督，指导稀疏、任务解耦的表征形成，提升双重转录性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 通过稀疏自编码器引导解耦提升双输出学习的语音表征
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 共享编码器的双输出ASR存在表征干扰，影响表面形式和语义导向转录的准确度。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在Conformer编码器后加入稀疏自编码器（SAE）作为中间可训练组件，并在多个层级施加CTC损失引导稀疏解耦。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验显示，SODA在双输出ASR任务上同时提升了字面和语义转录的质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该方法证明解耦表征可有效缓解多目标学习中的干扰，为复杂语音理解任务提供新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: trains instruction-following speech language model without instruction tuning, using only speech pre-training
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 无需指令微调，仅通过语音预训练获得遵循指令的语音语言模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 无需指令微调，仅通过语音预训练获得遵循指令的语音语言模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SpeechCombine is an instruction-following speech language model trained without any instruction tuning, achieving strong speech-text compositional abilities from a single round of speech pre-training.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对语音语言模型指令微调成本高、难以扩展的问题，提出SpeechCombine，无需指令微调，仅通过一轮语音预训练便赋予模型遵循指令和语音-文本组合的能力，大幅简化训练流程。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 解锁语音-文本组合能力：无需指令微调的遵循指令语音语言模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音语言模型需要大规模合成语音指令微调数据集，由于语音序列长，难以扩展。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SpeechCombine，通过精心设计的语音预训练策略，使模型在单一预训练阶段学习语音-文本组合能力，无需额外指令微调。
llm_ranked.result_cn: SpeechCombine在多个指令遵循和语音-文本任务上表现出色，媲美经指令微调的模型。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作证明了仅靠预训练即可解锁语音模型的指令遵循能力，为高效语音大模型训练开辟新路径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: advanced training methodologies for large speech models

llm_ranked.evidence_en: realistic Chinese speech task-oriented dialogue benchmark for evaluating speech LLMs in conversational AI
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向中文语音任务型对话的真实场景评估基准，用于测试语音大语言模型的交互能力
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向中文语音任务型对话的真实场景评估基准，用于测试语音大语言模型的交互能力
llm_ranked.tldr_en: RealTalk-CN is a Chinese speech task-oriented dialogue benchmark featuring spontaneous speech, disfluencies, and multi-turn interactions to evaluate speech LLMs in realistic settings, including cross-modal analysis.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 推出RealTalk-CN，一个包含真实声学条件的中文语音任务型对话基准，涵盖多轮、自发性及非流利语音，提供跨模态分析，旨在评估语音大语言模型在实际应用中的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: RealTalk-CN：面向现实中文语音任务型对话的基准与跨模态分析
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音对话基准多为文本或仅限于英文，忽略自然口语中的非流利和多样性，难以反映真实场景性能。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建包含多种声学条件的真实中文语音任务型对话数据集，涵盖多轮交互、自发停顿及说话人差异，并设计跨模态评估协议。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 基准测试显示，现有语音大模型在真实场景中表现下降，尤其在处理非流利语音和模态切换时。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该基准揭示了当前语音交互模型的不足，为未来研究提供了更现实的测试平台。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Test-time reinforcement learning adapts ASR to noisy accents without labels
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 测试时强化学习使ASR适应噪声和口音，无需标签
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 测试时强化学习使ASR适应噪声和口音，无需标签
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes ASR-TRA, a test-time adaptation method using reinforcement learning with audio-text semantic rewards to overcome confirmation bias in pseudo-labeling, boosting ASR robustness to noise and accents.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 为了提升自动语音识别系统在真实场景中面对噪声、口音等分布偏移时的鲁棒性，本文提出测试时强化学习方法ASR-TRA。与依赖伪标签的适应策略不同，该方法利用音频文本语义对齐作为奖励，引导模型在无真值条件下进行优化，有效抑制确认偏差，在多种分布外测试集上取得了显著的性能提升。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 通过测试时强化学习与音频文本语义奖励增强ASR鲁棒性
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: ASR模型对噪声和口音敏感，现有测试时适应易陷入确认偏差。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出ASR-TRA，在测试时利用强化学习和音频文本语义对齐奖励进行无标签适应。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在噪声和口音场景下显著提升识别准确率，优于传统伪标签方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 测试时强化学习避免确认偏差，为鲁棒自适应ASR开辟了新路径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Speech-aware long context pruning improves contextualized ASR with domain knowledge
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 语音感知长文本剪枝提升基于领域知识的上下文ASR
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 语音感知长文本剪枝提升基于领域知识的上下文ASR
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SAP^2, a two-stage framework that dynamically prunes and integrates relevant contextual keywords using speech-driven attention pooling to enhance ASR in long-context scenarios like conferences.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对自动语音识别在需要长上下文领域知识的场景（如会议）中难以利用稀疏关键信息的问题，本文提出SAP^2方法，通过语音驱动的注意力池化在两个阶段动态剪枝并集成相关上下文关键词，有效压缩了冗长上下文，显著提升了上下文场景下对专业术语等的识别准确率。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向上下文语音识别的语音感知长文本剪枝与集成方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: ASR难以利用长文本领域知识，上下文窗口受限且信息稀疏。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SAP^2，利用语音驱动注意力池化分两阶段剪枝和集成上下文关键词。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在需要领域知识的上下文语音识别任务中显著提升准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该框架有效扩展了ASR的上下文利用能力，增强了实用性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: pseudo-label correction using parameter-space arithmetic to improve ASR under domain shift
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用参数空间算术进行伪标签纠正，提升域迁移下的ASR
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用参数空间算术进行伪标签纠正，提升域迁移下的ASR
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a parameter-space correction method for ASR pseudo-labeling that captures and subtracts pseudo-label biases using a correction vector derived from paired real and pseudo-trained models, improving recognition under domain shift without target labels.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对域迁移下伪标签训练ASR会引入系统性偏差的问题，本文提出Pseudo2Real方法，在源域通过真实标签与伪标签训练的两个模型计算参数差异向量，用来纠正目标域伪标签模型的偏差。实验显示该方法无需目标域真实标签即可有效提升不同口音场景下的识别准确率，为半监督域适应提供了轻量参数级解决方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Pseudo2Real：基于任务算法的伪标签纠正在自动语音识别中的应用
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 伪标签在域迁移下引入系统性偏差，过滤方法难以修正。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在源域计算伪标签偏差向量，对目标模型进行参数空间纠正。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 无需目标域真值，有效提升跨域ASR性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 参数空间纠正为半监督域适应ASR提供了一种简单有效的方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy

llm_ranked.evidence_en: uses ASR models to provide word-level mismatch detection as fine-grained reward for TTS training
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用ASR模型提供词级别不匹配检测，作为TTS训练的细粒度奖励
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用ASR模型提供词级别不匹配检测，作为TTS训练的细粒度奖励
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper leverages pre-trained ASR models like Whisper to capture word-level speech-text mismatches, generating fine-grained rewards to improve TTS synthesis quality.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 当前TTS合成质量高，但评估方法仍依赖整段语音的MOS评分，难以定位局部错误。本文发现Whisper等ASR模型能精准捕获词级语音-文本不匹配，提出利用该能力生成细粒度奖励来优化TTS训练。实验证明该方法可有效提升合成语音的局部准确性和整体自然度，为TTS质量增强提供了新的技术思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 利用语音识别模型细粒度反馈提升文本到语音合成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有TTS评估技术滞后，传统MOS评分模型对整个语音段回归评分，无法捕捉孤立词级别的合成失败。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 发现Whisper等编码器-解码器ASR模型可在交叉注意力中精确捕获词级别语音与文本不匹配，据此提出细粒度奖励信号用于TTS训练优化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明该方法能显著提升合成语音的自然度和准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 将ASR模型的细粒度错误检测能力用于TTS训练，为语音合成质量提升开辟了新途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: generative error correction for audio-visual speech recognition using LLM to combine ASR and VSR hypotheses
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用大语言模型组合ASR和VSR假设进行视听语音识别的生成式纠错
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用大语言模型组合ASR和VSR假设进行视听语音识别的生成式纠错
llm_ranked.tldr_en: DualHyp employs an LLM to compose ASR and VSR N-best hypotheses with a noise-aware guidance mechanism for accurate audio-visual speech error correction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对视听语音识别中如何有效融合多模态证据提升识别精度的问题，提出生成式纠错框架DualHyp。该框架利用大语言模型集成ASR和VSR的独立N-best假设，并设计RelPrompt机制提供模态时间可靠性提示，引导模型动态切换关注点进行准确纠正。实验结果显示该方法在噪声环境下显著优于单一模态和传统融合方法，推动了音视觉语音识别性能提升。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 双头胜一头：基于双假设的视听语音纠错
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有视听语音识别模型未能有效利用模态特异性证据在语言空间进行推理，限制了识别准确率。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DualHyp框架，利用大语言模型组合独立的ASR和VSR模型的N-best假设，并引入RelPrompt噪声感知引导机制动态调整模态置信度以纠正错误。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明DualHyp显著提升了不同噪声条件下的识别准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 通过大语言模型整合多模态假设进行生成式纠错，为视听语音识别提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: unified framework jointly modeling speaker identity and temporal for multi-speaker ASR accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 统一框架联合建模说话人身份和时间信息，提升多说话人语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 统一框架联合建模说话人身份和时间信息，提升多说话人语音识别准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: TellWhisper jointly models speaker identity and temporal information within the Whisper encoder, significantly improving multi-speaker ASR performance under challenging conditions.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多说话人语音识别中时间与说话人建模分离导致的性能衰减问题，本文提出TellWhisper框架。该方法在Whisper编码器内统一建模说话人身份和时间线索，避免了现有方法中信息损失或内容混淆。实验在重叠语音和快速话轮转换场景下取得显著增益，为多说话人对话理解提供了更鲁棒的识别技术。
llm_ranked.title_zh: TellWhisper：告诉Whisper谁在何时说话
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有多说话人语音识别解耦时间建模和说话人建模，在快速话轮转换和重叠语音下性能脆弱。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出统一框架TellWhisper，在语音编码器中联合建模说话人身份和时间信息，避免信息损失和内容混淆。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明该方法显著提升了多说话人场景下的识别准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为多说话人语音识别提供了更鲁棒的联合建模方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: End-turn detection for conversational speech assistants
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向对话式语音助手的话轮结束检测
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向对话式语音助手的话轮结束检测
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SpeculativeETD, a collaborative inference framework and the first public end-turn detection dataset for speech chatbots, improving conversational flow.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 在构建自然口语对话系统时，准确检测用户是否话轮结束是一个关键难题，现有语音助手常因误判导致交互卡顿或抢话。针对此问题，本文提出推测式话轮结束检测器SpeculativeETD，通过协同推理框架在语音理解过程中提前预测话轮边界，并发布首个公开ETD数据集OpenETD，涵盖多样化的合成与真实语音。实验结果显示，该方法显著提升了检测准确率和推理效率，从而改善语音助手的响应流畅度，对促进语音用户界面和对话式AI的设计与落地具有重要实践意义。该研究首次为ETD提供公开基准，对学术和工业界推动更智能的语音交互技术具有重要意义。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向高效语音聊天助手的推测式话轮结束检测器
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 在口语对话系统中，准确检测话轮结束至关重要，但现有方法难以区分话轮结束与思考停顿，导致交互不流畅。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 本文提出SpeculativeETD推测式协同推理框架，利用早期检测线索提前判断话轮边界，平衡效率与准确度，并构建OpenETD数据集。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 发布首个公开ETD数据集，包含合成和真实语音；实验表明该方法有效减少误触发与响应延迟，提升对话流畅性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作为语音助手交互设计提供了有效的话轮管理方案，对提升对话AI自然度有重要价值，奠定了基础数据集。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: End-to-end pipeline for fine-grained speech caption annotation enabling better language-speech pre-training
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向语言-语音预训练的细粒度语音描述标注流水线
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向语言-语音预训练的细粒度语音描述标注流水线
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes FCaps, a large-scale dataset with 47k hours of speech and 19M fine-grained free-text style descriptions, along with an end-to-end annotation pipeline that grounds captions in audio, improving language-speech pre-training.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 语言-语音预训练中，细粒度说话风格建模因缺乏大规模标注而进展缓慢。本文构建了FCaps数据集，含47k小时语音和19M细粒度自由文本描述，并提出一种新型端到端标注流水线，直接基于音频生成详细描述，避免传统级联流水线的误差传播。LLM-as-a-judge评估显示，我们的标注在正确性、覆盖率和细粒度上均优于现有方法。该数据集和流水线为提升语音模型的表现力和多风格控制能力提供了关键资源，对语音合成、识别及多模态学习均有重要价值。该工作为大规模语音预训练提供了高质量的细粒度监督信号。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向细粒度和多粒度对比语言-语音预训练
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 当前语言-语音模型因缺少可扩展的细粒度风格标注，训练通常依赖粗糙标题或任务特定监督，限制了说话风格建模能力。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 我们构建了FCaps数据集，包含47k小时语音和19M细粒度自由文本描述，并提出直接音频接地的端到端标注流水线，避免LLM重写的误差传播。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 使用LLM-as-a-judge评估，证明我们的标注在正确性、覆盖率上超越现有级联方法，为细粒度对比预训练提供高质量数据。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: FCaps显著提升语言-语音模型对说话风格的理解和生成能力，为大规模自监督语音模型训练奠定了数据基础。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Using LLM as conductor for controllable text-to-speech synthesis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 将大语言模型用作指挥者实现可控文本到语音合成
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 将大语言模型用作指挥者实现可控文本到语音合成
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes BatonVoice, an operationalist framework that decouples instruction understanding and speech generation, using LLM to generate explicit vocal features for controllable TTS.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有大语言模型（LLM）集成的语音合成方法未能充分挖掘LLM的指令遵循能力，限制了文本到语音（TTS）的可控性。受操作主义启发，本文提出BatonVoice框架，将指令理解与语音生成解耦，让LLM扮演指挥角色，理解用户指令并规划显式声学特征。这种解耦设计提升了可控语音合成的准确性和灵活性。实验表明，BatonVoice能执行复杂的文本指令生成高质量语音，拓展了LLM在语音合成中的应用前景，为交互式语音界面提供了有力的技术支撑。该工作展示了如何有效利用LLM的语言智能来改进语音生成质量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: BatonVoice：一种利用大语言模型语言学智能增强可控语音合成的操作主义框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音合成方法未能充分利用LLM的指令遵循能力，限制了文本指令控制TTS的灵活性。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出操作主义新范式，解耦指令理解与语音生成，LLM作为指挥理解用户指令并生成文本计划——显式声学特征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: BatonVoice实现了高效的可控语音合成，能够根据复杂文本指令生成符合要求的语音。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该框架为TTS系统提供了更强的可控性和通用性，推动了LLM与语音生成的有效融合。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: text to speech quality enhancement methods

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Adapting speech language models for multi-turn speech-based medical consultation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 适应语音语言模型用于多轮语音医学咨询
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 适应语音语言模型用于多轮语音医学咨询
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SpeechMedAssist, a two-stage training paradigm to efficiently adapt speech language models for medical consultation, enabling natural multi-turn speech interactions.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 医疗咨询天然适合语音交互，但现有工作多为文本形式，且医学语音数据稀少、直接微调语音模型成本高。本文提出SpeechMedAssist，一种原生支持多轮语音交互的语音语言模型。通过解耦训练为知识注入和指令微调两个阶段，高效地实现领域适配。在医疗对话任务上的实验表明，该方法能有效处理患者语音查询并生成恰当回复，为语音助手在医疗等专业领域的应用提供了实用范式。该方法减少对大规模标注数据的依赖，加速了语音对话系统的垂直领域迁移。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpeechMedAssist：高效有效地将语音语言模型适配至医疗咨询
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 医疗咨询本应语音驱动，但现有研究多基于长文本交互，且医学语音数据稀缺、微调低效。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用SpeechLM架构特性，将单阶段训练解耦为知识注入与指令微调的两阶段范式。
llm_ranked.result_cn: SpeechMedAssist能够进行多轮语音交互，在医学问答等任务上高效适配并取得良好效果。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作为语音模型在垂直领域的部署提供了高效适配方案，推动口语对话系统落地医疗场景。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Joint speaker diarization and speech recognition with multimodal LLM to improve ASR accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用多模态大语言模型联合说话人分割和语音识别以提升ASR准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用多模态大语言模型联合说话人分割和语音识别以提升ASR准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SpeakerLM, a unified multimodal LLM for end-to-end speaker diarization and recognition, jointly handling who spoke when and what, reducing error propagation and improving ASR in multi-speaker scenes.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 在会议转录等真实多说话人场景中，说话人分割与识别（SDR）任务至关重要，但现有级联系统存在误差传播和缺乏联合优化等问题。本文提出SpeakerLM，一种基于多模态大语言模型的端到端框架，统一处理“谁在何时说了什么”，同时进行说话人分割和语音识别。通过联合训练，SpeakerLM能够更好地处理重叠语音，减少级联误差，在识别准确率上显著优于传统方法。该工作为复杂音频环境下的语音识别和对话系统提供了一种高效、集成的解决方案，对智能会议、对话分析等应用具有重要价值。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SpeakerLM：基于多模态大语言模型的端到端多功能说话人分割与识别
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 级联式说话人分割与识别系统存在误差传播、重叠语音难处理、缺乏联合优化等问题，影响ASR精度。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SpeakerLM，一个统一的多模态大语言模型，端到端联合执行说话人分割和语音识别，实现协同优化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多说话人场景如会议转录中，SpeakerLM优于级联系统，有效处理重叠语音并提升识别准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该模型为多说话人语音识别提供了一个端到端解决方案，显著增强了复杂场景下的语音交互能力。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: techniques to enhance speech recognition performance and accuracy

llm_ranked.evidence_en: proposes a multi-latency data curation strategy for training simultaneous speech translation models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出了用于训练同声传译模型的多延迟数据管理策略
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出了用于训练同声传译模型的多延迟数据管理策略
llm_ranked.tldr_en: To address inefficiency in LLM-based simultaneous speech translation, the paper proposes EASiST, a fully unidirectional architecture with a multi-latency data curation strategy that avoids repeated encoding and fixed read/write policies, improving translation quality and reducing latency.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有基于大语言模型的同声传译方法存在计算开销大或策略固定等问题。本文提出EASiST框架，采用完全单向架构和多延迟数据管理策略，训练时生成不同延迟的翻译数据，推理时根据源语音动态调整读写策略。实验表明，该方法在保持翻译质量的同时显著降低计算复杂度和响应延迟，为语音到文本的实时翻译提供了高效方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 高效自适应同声传译的全单向架构
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 解决基于LLM的同声传译中重复编码和固定策略导致的效率低下问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出完全单向架构的EASiST，采用多延迟数据管理策略和自适应读写策略。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在保证翻译质量的同时减少了计算开销，实现了更低延迟的同声传译。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: EASiST为实时语音翻译提供了高效、自适应的解决方案，推动了语音模型在翻译任务中的应用。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: data pipeline and preprocessing for speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: uses RL to align speech and text trajectories to close reasoning gap in Speech LLMs
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用强化学习对齐语音和文本轨迹以缩小语音大模型的推理差距
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用强化学习对齐语音和文本轨迹以缩小语音大模型的推理差距
llm_ranked.tldr_en: TARS proposes a reinforcement learning method with asymmetric rewards to align representation and behavior between speech and text modalities, significantly reducing the reasoning gap in Speech LLMs.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 语音大模型在语音输入上的推理能力明显弱于文字。本文提出TARS框架，通过非对称奖励的强化学习，对齐语音和文本条件下的表示与行为轨迹。在多个推理基准上，该方法有效缩小模态推理差距，增强了语音模型的理解和逻辑能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 缩小语音大模型的模态推理差距
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音大模型存在严重的模态推理差距，语音推理性能远落后于文本。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于强化学习的TARS框架，使用表示对齐和行为对齐两个稠密信号。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多项推理任务上显著提高了语音输入的推理准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: TARS为语音大模型的推理能力提升提供了有效训练方法，促进了语音理解的发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: advanced training methodologies for large speech models

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Explores Mamba-based HuBERT for self-supervised speech models, improving long-context and streaming ASR
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 探索基于Mamba的HuBERT作为自监督语音模型，改进长上下文和流式语音识别
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 探索基于Mamba的HuBERT作为自监督语音模型，改进长上下文和流式语音识别
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper investigates Mamba-based HuBERT as an alternative to Transformers for speech SSL, demonstrating linear-time complexity benefits for long-context and streaming ASR, and competitive performance on SUPERB benchmarks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 虽然Mamba在语言建模上取得成果，但其在语音自监督学习中的潜力尚未充分探索。本文构建基于Mamba的HuBERT模型，利用选择性状态空间实现线性时间处理，在长上下文和流式ASR微调中显著降低计算量，并在SUPERB基准上取得有竞争力的表现，分析还表明其量化表征质量更高且能更清晰地捕捉说话人特征。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 探索Mamba在语音自监督模型中的应用
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: Mamba在语音SSL中的潜力尚未充分探索，先前工作仅限于孤立任务。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于Mamba的HuBERT模型，利用选择性状态空间进行自监督预训练。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 模型在长上下文和流式ASR上计算量更低，SUPERB基准上性能有竞争力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Mamba架构为语音自监督学习提供了高效且有效的替代方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: large-scale self-supervised speech model training

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Proposes a real-time diffusion-transformer for talking head generation, using compressed video latent and SpeechAE for alignment
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出实时扩散Transformer框架，通过压缩视频潜在空间和SpeechAE实现音频-视觉对齐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出实时扩散Transformer框架，通过压缩视频潜在空间和SpeechAE实现音频-视觉对齐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: READ achieves real-time audio-driven talking head generation by learning a spatiotemporally compressed video latent space and using a Speech Autoencoder for alignment, significantly accelerating diffusion-based generation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 扩散模型在说话人头部生成中取得进展，但推理速度极慢。本文提出READ框架，通过时序VAE学习高度压缩的视频潜在空间以减少Token数量，并设计预训练SpeechAE生成压缩语音潜在码以增强音频-视觉对齐，实现了实时高效的异步扩散生成，大幅提升了推理速度。
llm_ranked.title_zh: READ：面向音频驱动说话人头部生成的实时高效异步扩散框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 扩散模型在说话人头部生成中推理速度慢，难以实用。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 使用时序VAE压缩视频潜在空间，并引入SpeechAE进行音频-视觉对齐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: READ实现了实时生成，显著加速了扩散推理。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 通过压缩和对齐实现了高效实时的音频驱动视觉生成。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision and speech multimodal learning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Addresses disfluencies in ASR transcripts for chatbots and voice assistants using LLM-based correction
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 解决ASR转录中的不流利问题，以提升聊天机器人和语音助手的可靠性
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 解决ASR转录中的不流利问题，以提升聊天机器人和语音助手的可靠性
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes a disfluency-aware objective tuning method for LLMs to correct ASR transcripts, preserving grammatical structure and semantic coherence, improving downstream conversational AI applications.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: ASR转录中常包含填充词、重复等不流利现象，影响下游对话系统。本文提出基于LLM的不流利感知目标调优方法，不仅识别而且纠正不流利部分，保持语法和语义连贯性，实验表明在多语言设置中有效提升转录可读性，从而增强聊天机器人和语音助手的可靠性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 注意停顿：基于不流利感知目标调优的多语言语音纠正与LLM
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: ASR不流利现象降低可读性，干扰聊天机器人和语音助手等下游应用。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出不流利感知目标调优，利用LLM纠正ASR转录保持连贯性。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 多语言实验中有效提升转录质量，增强下游系统可靠性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: LLM调优为语音交互系统的鲁棒性提供了新的纠错方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Proposes contrastive language-speech retriever for long audio, enhancing spoken QA in conversational AI
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 提出对比语言-语音检索器处理长音频，增强对话AI中的语音问答
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 提出对比语言-语音检索器处理长音频，增强对话AI中的语音问答
llm_ranked.tldr_en: CLSR is an end-to-end contrastive retriever that extracts question-relevant segments from long audio for spoken QA, improving conversational AI performance on long-form speech.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有语音问答模型难以处理长音频，本文提出的CLSR采用端到端对比语言-语音预训练，通过中间步骤将声学特征转换为文本表示，有效检索长录音中的相关片段，从而辅助下游问答系统，实验证明在长语音问答任务上性能优于现有检索器。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向长语音问答的端到端对比语言-语音预训练模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音问答模型面对长音频时性能受限，检索器表现不佳。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出端到端对比语言-语音检索器，通过中间文本转换提取相关片段。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在长语音问答任务上优于现有方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 对比预训练检索器有效支撑了基于检索增强的语音问答。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: voice user interface conversational AI design

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Attention-based detection of hallucinations in SpeechLLMs for ASR and speech translation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于注意力的SpeechLLM幻觉检测，用于自动语音识别和语音翻译
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于注意力的SpeechLLM幻觉检测，用于自动语音识别和语音翻译
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes attention-derived metrics and logistic regression classifiers to detect hallucinations in Speech Large Language Models at inference time, improving reliability of ASR and speech translation outputs.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 随着语音大语言模型在自动语音识别等任务中的广泛应用，其产生的幻觉问题严重制约可靠性。本文提出利用注意力图提取音频一致性等四类量化特征，并基于此训练逻辑回归模型进行推理时检测。该方法不依赖金标准，在Qwen-2-Audio等模型上验证有效，为保障语音模型输出质量提供了轻量级实用工具。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 利用注意力图检测语音大语言模型在推理时的幻觉
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 语音大语言模型易产生幻觉，现有检测方法依赖金标准且忽略音频特有信号。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提取音频与文本注意力图衍生指标，训练轻量级逻辑回归分类器进行推理时检测。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在ASR与翻译任务上有效识别幻觉，不依赖金标准，计算开销小。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 所提基于注意力的幻觉检测方法增强了语音模型的可靠性与实用性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Depth-aware LoRA adaptation for efficient multilingual ASR in low-resource languages
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 深度感知LoRA适配用于低资源语言的高效多语言ASR
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 深度感知LoRA适配用于低资源语言的高效多语言ASR
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Reveals U-shaped adaptability across layers in multilingual ASR, proposes depth-aware LoRA placing more adapters in early/late layers for low-resource languages, achieving accuracy gains with few parameters.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多语言语音识别模型在低资源语言上微调效率低、过拟合的问题，本文分析模型内部表示发现语言特异性呈U型分布，提出在浅层和深层分配更多LoRA模块的深度感知适配策略，在仅更新少量参数的情况下显著提升了低资源语言的识别准确率。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 在关键之处适配：低资源语言高效多语言语音识别的深度感知适配
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 低资源语言ASR微调计算量大且易过拟合，参数高效方法未考虑层间差异。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 分析多语言ASR模型语言特异性分布，提出深度感知LoRA仅在浅深层加强适配。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在低资源语言上显著提升识别准确率，参数量少且高效。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 深度感知适配为低资源语言ASR提供了高效率、高性能的解决思路。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: automatic speech recognition accuracy improvement techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Unified Whisper-based diarization and ASR framework improves transcription accuracy
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于Whisper的统一说话人日志与语音识别框架，提升转录准确率
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于Whisper的统一说话人日志与语音识别框架，提升转录准确率
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes WhisperDiari, a token-space framework that jointly performs speaker diarization and ASR using semantic and speaker information, improving timestamp accuracy and downstream transcription.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 为解决说话人日志中边界检测不准与语义分割错误影响ASR转录质量的问题，本文提出WhisperDiari，在令牌空间构建统一的说话人日志与语音识别框架，利用预训练Whisper模型的语义与说话人信息，提升了时间戳精度和最终转录准确率，有广阔实用价值。
llm_ranked.title_zh: WhisperDiari：基于Whisper的在令牌空间融合语义与说话人信息的说话人日志框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 传统说话人日志边界不准、语义分割错误，影响ASR转录准确性。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出WhisperDiari，在离散令牌空间利用Whisper语义与说话人信息统一建模。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 提升了说话人边界检测和语义分割精度，改善了ASR输出质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 统一的说话人日志与ASR框架提高了实用性，推动了语音转录技术发展。
